register.title: Regions Bank Loan Default — Aug 2026 Maturity
register.description: USD 4.1M term loan matures 15 Aug 2026. Failure to refinance triggers default, personal guarantee call, potential cross-default on GoWell corporate facilities.
register.owner: CFO / Zhang West Houston Housing LLC

register.title: Refinancing Terms Deterioration
register.description: US commercial lending market tightened; subsidised dormitory use may require lender to apply lower LTV, forcing equity injection of $500K–$1M.

register.title: Cross-Default on GoWell Corporate Facilities
register.description: If Houston facility defaults, cross-default clauses in GoWell Energy Solutions' Singapore banking facilities could be triggered, disrupting the U.S. public listing process and drawing SEC scrutiny of the PropCo/OpCo related-party structure.

register.title: HVAC System Failure — Summer 2026
register.description: Phase 2 HVAC units in Building A west wing are end-of-life; failure during Houston summer (June–August) causes tenant non-habitability and potential OSHA complaints.

register.title: Houston Energy Corridor Market Softness
register.description: Persistent office vacancy ~18% in Energy Corridor reduces asset value and limits refinancing options — lenders apply more conservative LTV cap.

register.title: Dormitory Occupancy Decline
register.description: Headcount reduction at GoWell US or employee preference to rent market-rate apartments could reduce occupancy below 75%, eliminating NOI buffer.

register.title: Texas Property Tax Reassessment
register.description: Harris County appraisal district could reassess dormitory complex value upward on next triennial review, increasing property tax by $8,000–$15,000/yr.

register.title: US Interest Rate Environment
register.description: If Fed holds rates elevated into 2027, refinancing cost could increase from 5.15% to 6.0–6.5%, adding $35K–$55K/yr to debt service.

scenarios.name: Successful Refinancing at 5.5% (Base Case)
scenarios.verdict: Manageable — higher rate adds $26K/yr in debt service but avoids default. Recommend 5-year term with I/O period option.

scenarios.name: Refinancing Fails — Bridge Loan Required (6-month bridge at 8.5%)
scenarios.verdict: High stress — bridge financing at 8.5% is USD $87K more expensive than current. Avoid by initiating refinancing before July 2026.

mitigationPlan.action: Contact Regions Bank for extension/rollover terms before June 15; simultaneously brief 3 alternative lenders (Wells Fargo RE, Berkadia, CBRE Capital)
Commission CBRE appraisal update explicitly including market-rate income approach to support maximum LTV
Obtain contractor quotes for Phase 2 HVAC immediately; schedule installation before summer peak season
